name: no-sdr
description: Multi-user WebSDR server for RTL-SDR dongles — real-time waterfall, stereo FM, AM/SSB/CW, digital mode decoding

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:go
scripts.build:go: cd serverng && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:native: cd serverng && CGO_ENABLED=0 GOAMD64=v3 go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:opus: cd serverng && go build -tags opus -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:opus:native: cd serverng && GOAMD64=v3 go build -tags opus -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:full: cd serverng && go build -tags "opus rtlsdr" -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
scripts.build:go:full:native: cd serverng && GOAMD64=v3 go build -tags "opus rtlsdr" -ldflags="-s -w" -o bin/serverng ./cmd/serverng
